metadata.relation_to_case: Former Typist, Claimed to Have Typed the Will
metadata.occupation: Typist (Currently Absent, Reported to Have Fled to Nepal)

content: I worked at Shree Vani Typing Center from 2014 to 2021. I was hired by a woman named Priya in March 2017 to type a document for her father. I typed a single-page will on 10/03/2017. I did not read its contents. She gave me a handwritten draft and asked me to make it formal. I signed an affidavit to that effect. I was not paid much. I do not know if the signature was real. I was on leave from 08/03/2017 to 14/03/2017 due to my mother’s illness — I submitted a leave form. But I did go to work on 10/03/2017 because my sister was hospitalized and I had to deliver the document. I don’t know why my attendance log says I was absent. I have no idea about the notary or the land records. I left India because I feared for my life after receiving a call from an unknown number saying, 'You’re the only loose end.'
